description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, vertically-oriented wooden enclosure with a rich, dark brown finish. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers: a larger woofer at the bottom and a smaller tweeter above, both set in black mounting rings. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, highlighting the wood grain texture. The rear panel includes a rectangular black plate, likely for wiring or connection ports, but no visible controls or branding. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for home or public urban environments. The object appears robust and capable of producing high-quality audio output.
description: A classic, rectangular wooden stereo speaker with two black circular drivers on the front and a black connection plate on the back. The finish is dark brown wood with a smooth, polished appearance.
description_view_0: A plain, dark brown wooden side panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The rear view shows a lighter brown wooden panel with a rectangular black plate near the bottom, likely for connections.
description_view_2: Another plain, dark brown wooden side panel, mirroring the opposite side with no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The front view displays two black circular speaker drivers (woofer and tweeter) set into a brown wooden face, with four small black corner pads.
